description: Infrastructure health for the IntuneDeviceActions stamp: Function Apps, Storage (incl. PNA), Service Bus, App Configuration, Event Grid, Automation runbooks and end-to-end availability.

list.name: prefix
list.label: Name prefix
list.description: Resource name prefix used by the stamp (apps + storage).

title: IntuneDeviceActions — Infrastructure Health

panels.title: Function Apps — HTTP 5xx (range)
panels.description: Server errors across all Function Apps. Should be 0.

panels.title: Storage — min availability %
panels.description: Lowest availability across the storage accounts.

panels.title: Service Bus — dead-lettered messages
panels.description: Messages parked in any DLQ. Should be 0.

panels.title: Function Apps (Web / Proc / capability hosts / portal)
HTTP response time (avg)
panels.description: Average HTTP response time per app.

panels.title: Throttled transactions (ClientThrottlingError)
panels.description: Non-zero values indicate the account is being throttled.

panels.title: Public Network Access (PNA) per storage account
panels.description: PNA should be Enabled in dev (an external job periodically disables it). Mirrors the hourly PNA check/enable schedule.

azureResourceGraph.query: Resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and resourceGroup =~ '${resourceGroup}' | project name, publicNetworkAccess = tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess), location, sku = tostring(sku.name) | order by name asc

panels.title: Automation — runbook jobs by status
panels.description: Wipe / Autopilot / BitLocker / Rename runbook executions, split by status.

azureLogAnalytics.query: requests | where timestamp > $__timeFrom() and timestamp < $__timeTo() | summarize failures = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m), cloud_RoleName | order by timestamp asc
exceptions | where timestamp > $__timeFrom() and timestamp < $__timeTo() | summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), cloud_RoleName | order by timestamp asc
